## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to out-market educational content to streamline production and improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Develop comprehensive editorial guidelines and style guide to reduce revisions](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Set concrete goals for content output (words/posts) and revision rounds to drive urgency](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Explore additional distribution channels beyond SEO to maximize content impact](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Collaborate on keyword prioritization and outline review process to align on content direction](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Shift focus to out-market educational content](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Easier for AI/writers to produce and edit](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Allows for standardization of style and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Lower risk compared to product-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Builds foundation for future product-led content](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Editorial Process Optimization

  - [Develop comprehensive style guide and editorial guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim to reduce revision rounds (goal: 1 round of minor edits)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Implement checklist for common edits](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Consider reviewing outlines before full drafts to catch misalignments early](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2948.0)
  - [Improve internal linking strategy, both within new content and to existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)

### Content Production Goals

  - [Set minimum word count / post count targets (e.g. 30,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Track drafted vs. published content more closely](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)
  - [Add word count and draft/publish dates to content tracking system](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)

### Keyword Research and Prioritization

  - [Refresh keyword list with focus on out-market topics](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Implement AfterShoot's prioritization matrix:](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Factors: search volume, business relevancy, topical authority, audience relevancy](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Calculate quality score (multiply relevancy factors)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Set minimum quality score threshold (e.g. 40)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [Prioritize based on total score (quality score \* volume)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)

### Distribution Strategy

  - [Explore channels beyond SEO (e.g. social, email, community)](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Consider distribution potential during content planning phase](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Focus on tip-based content and articles with expert quotes for wider appeal](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### On-Page SEO and Publishing

  - [Improve process for optimizing meta descriptions, titles, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)
  - [Show internal linking work earlier in the draft process](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Fact-check all AI-generated content and quotes](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to send 5 content outlines to Monalisa for review by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [GrowthX to refresh keyword list with out-market focus](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Collaborate on developing comprehensive style guide and editorial guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Add word count and draft/publish date columns to content tracking system](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [Implement AfterShoot's keyword prioritization matrix into research process](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
  - [Explore fact-checker module for AI-generated content verification](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Develop strategy for updating existing content with internal links to new pages](https://fathom.video/share/w39-s6EAnUwEny41cQJn-tLxF3T7ysAD?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
